title: Image bank asset v1
description: Metadata for a single image in the Image Bank. Asset Resolver and FormatAdapter depend on composition_compat, tags, and style_version. composition_compat is computed during bank generation: 1.0 = generated natively at that aspect, 0.5 = croppable without losing subject, 0.0 = incompatible.

tags.description: persona_id, topic_id, location_id, emotion, style_id, character_id (when layer_type=character)

generation_batch.description: Batch identifier for deprecation and debugging

composition_compat.description: Per-aspect composition score 0–1. Computed at bank generation: 1.0 = native at that ratio, 0.5 = croppable without losing subject, 0.0 = incompatible. FormatAdapter uses these to keep or swap assets.

caption_safe_zone.description: True if asset has low-detail area suitable for caption overlay (e.g. bottom 25%)

safety_score.description: Post-generation safety classifier score; QC gate

file_path.description: Path to image file (stills only in Phase 1–3)

prompt_version.description: Reference to prompt that generated this asset
